heading: Use of construction project funds to reimburse Capitol Police for related overtime costs
label: 1862a Use of construction project funds to reimburse Capitol Police for related overtime costs
notes: CodificationSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2012, which is div. G of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2012.

children.heading: Payment of overtime costs
children.label: a Payment of overtime costs
children.text: The Architect of the Capitol shall transfer amounts made available for construction projects during a fiscal year to the applicable appropriations accounts of the United States Capitol Police in order to reimburse the Capitol Police for overtime costs incurred in connection with such projects.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: b Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2013 and each succeeding fiscal year.
